description: generate a publication-quality scientific schematic from a text prompt via an LLM image model (Nano Banana 2 on OpenRouter)
rules: read-only on inputs — image written to record_store as schematic.png (plus _vN iterations and a review log)
PROMPT is a natural-language description of the diagram
DOC_TYPE (journal|conference|poster|presentation|report|grant|thesis|preprint|default) sets the quality threshold; smart iteration stops early once met (max 2 iterations)
requires OPENROUTER_API_KEY and network access to openrouter.ai
entry script generate_schematic.py shells out to its sibling generate_schematic_ai.py (both vendored in src/)
usage: Set PROMPT and OPENROUTER_API_KEY. Optionally DOC_TYPE. Output: schematic.png.
limitation: Requires OPENROUTER_API_KEY and network access to an LLM image model — cannot run offline. Costs API credits.

vars.PROMPT: Citation management workflow: search -> extract -> validate -> format
